MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Antoinette Young, Clerks K. Shaw/M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Jim Green and Deborah Farrar, property managers, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Bayside Village Associates.
Jonathan H. Bornstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Gil Perez is present.
Joey Koomas representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, stipulation filed with the clerk, the trial date is off calendar.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
